# OhMyOpenSource! - Feature Request

This is the `feature_request.md` issue template used across OhMyOpenSource! repositories. Place it at `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md`.

See [Issue Tracking](../project/issue-tracking) for the full conventions around writing and managing issues.

---

## Template

```markdown
---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement, status:needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?
     Describe the context clearly - who is affected and what is the impact. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.
     Be as specific as possible. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Define what "done" looks like for this feature.
     Each item should be verifiable. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you have considered and why they were rejected. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, references, related issues, or any other relevant information. -->
```
